channel.title: Hardening Network on Bill's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Hardening Network on Bill's Blog

item.title: Virtual VLAN Segmentation on pfSense — Three Isolated Zones, No Managed Switch
item.description: Building three firewall-isolated network segments — Trusted, IoT, and Guest — entirely in virtual machines, with no managed-switch hardware, and proving the isolation holds.

item.title: Hardening My Debian Home-Lab VM — Even Behind pfSense
item.description: The VM is already isolated behind a pfSense firewall — so why harden it? Because two paths reach in without ever crossing pfSense. An honest audit of my own box, the fixes, and the sandbox gotcha that broke a service.

item.title: Hardening and Segmenting My Home Network on an Arcadyan HWG2025
item.description: How I hardened and segmented my home network on an ISP-provided Wi-Fi 7 router — and the DNS gotcha that makes doing it properly harder than it should be.
